self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Whitemoon Bristle (R1): after Normal Attacks deal Elemental DMG, gain the Foliar Incision effect, increasing DMG dealt by Normal Attacks and Elemental Skills by an amount equal to 120% of Elemental Mastery, for up to 28 DMG instances or 12s (obtainable once every 12s). Approximated as a flat +240 Normal Attack and Elemental Skill DMG, assuming ~200 Elemental Mastery (no eval-time EM-to-flat-dmg conversion key exists).
